import React, { useEffect, useState } from 'react'; import axios from 'axios' function MaterialList() { const [material, setmaterial] = useState([]) useEffect(() => { axios .get('http://localhost:8081') .then(res => setmaterial(res.data)) .catch(err => console.log(err)); }, []) return(
{ material.map((data, i) => { }) }
Material ID Name Description Unit of Measure Price per Unit Recent Vendor
{data.matid} {data.name} {data.description} {data.unit_of_measure} {data.price_per_unit} {data.recent_vendor}
) } export default MaterialList
